mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::bigint AS correct FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ua.problem_type AS problemType, COUNT(*)::bigint AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::bigint AS correct FROM user_answer ua WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ua.problem_type

SELECT TRIM(s.name) AS category, COUNT(*)::bigint AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::bigint AS correct FROM user_answer ua JOIN problem p ON ua.problem_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY TRIM(s.name)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem) AS objective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subjective_problems) AS subjective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM programming_language_problems) AS programming_count

SELECT ua.id AS id, ua.problem_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, COALESCE(p.question, sp.question, plp.question) AS question, COALESCE(p.answer, sp.answer, plp.answer) AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua LEFT JOIN problem p ON ua.problem_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.problem_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.problem_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.reference_id = plp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false ORDER BY ua.submitted_at DESC
